历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 1867 (including special fluctuations that year), in 2023 approximately 416, in 2024 approximately 382, and in 2025 approximately 559; over the past three years, the rank fluctuated between 382 and 559, with 2025 moving back about 177 places compared to 2024, and the baseline rank approximately 559; the university's enrollment plan for science/physics in Ningxia: 50 in 2022, 55 in 2023, 51 in 2024, 65 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 54, a reduction of 11 (-16.9%) compared to 2025, with a significant decrease in enrollment slots, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 8th in the Shanghai Ranking of Chinese Universities from 2021 to 2024, dropping to 9th in 2025-2026, still firmly in the national top ten, belonging to top-tier engineering strong schools; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is relatively positive, with the cafeteria conditions ranked first nationally and high enrollment transparency, exerting a positive attraction on candidates; total Douyin popularity ranking 22nd (relatively hot), once ranked 2nd in 2021 (very hot), with high attention on short video platforms; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; has A+ disciplines: Mechanical Engineering, Optical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering; A disciplines: Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Materials Science and Engineering, Physics, Control Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Management Science and Engineering; A- disciplines: Clinical Medicine, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Journalism and Communication, Biology, Biomedical Engineering, Basic Medicine, Chemistry, Business Administration. A total of 17 disciplines at A- and above, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., continue to be highly recommended majors with extremely high social attention; the total number of candidates in Ningxia for the 2026 college entrance examination is approximately 66,000 (including uncertain marks), estimated at about 44,550 based on the 2025 physics category proportion of 67.5%, basically flat with the 2025 physics category of 44,491, with a stable candidate scale; in 2025, the physics undergraduate batch score was 372 points, special type 441 points, with little fluctuation in score lines; Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, belonging to the central region; the university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia is about 2.0% (2025), at a medium level for out-of-province enrollment; Ningxia candidates have stable willingness to apply to central 985 universities, with no obvious regional preference shift.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline rank of 559, a 16.9% enrollment reduction in 2026 (supply-demand elasticity calculation reduces the rank number to about 502), a positive university reputation, and sustained high popularity of hot majors (attracting more candidates to apply, partially offsetting the reduction effect), the estimated minimum admission rank for 2026 is approximately 512, slightly moving forward compared to 2025 (rank number decreases), with a range of 450-574.

学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 9th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the national top ten, with strong comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, with the cafeteria conditions ranked first nationwide and the journalism and communication discipline ranking among the top, attracting some liberal arts candidates; Douyin popularity total ranking 22nd (relatively hot), with high attention; no obvious records of admission gaps; Journalism and Communication rated A-, Business Administration rated A-, directly corresponding to the liberal arts enrollment majors (Journalism and Communication, Economics), ensuring discipline strength.
